title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE MALIMONO DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALIMONO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, FROM TEN (10) TO TWENTY-FIVE (25) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 803 / 88 OG No. 18, 2534 (May 4, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7270, March 20, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE MALIMONO DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALIMONO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, FROM TEN (10) TO TWENTY-FIVE (25) BEDS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the Malimono District Hospital in the Municipality of Malimono, Province of Surigao del Norte, is hereby increased from ten (10) to twenty-five (25) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 16, 1992 and December 17, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 20, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
